description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

The convenience store service for issuing tax (non-taxable) and income certificates will be temporarily suspended from May 31 to June 2, 2026 (Reiwa 8) for system maintenance. Service resumes on June 3, 2026 (Reiwa 8).

If you need a certificate during the suspension period, use one of these locations:

【Hanno City Hall and District Administrative Centers】 9:00 AM – 4:30 PM (except Fujimi District Administrative Center)

【Hanno Station Service Counter】 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM (same-day tax certificate issuance: 9:00 AM – 4:30 PM)

All other convenience store services remain available as usual.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/johosystem/13166.html
summary: ℹ️ Convenience store service for tax and income certificates suspended
